reviews.review_title: Really fun mario party like game...
reviews.review_description:
Id give the game 5 Stars easily if they added more boards to play on, if not more boards or additions to this game I'd lve to see a sequel, me and my group of friends would buy it in a heartbeat...

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

This is a fun party game that really shines with friends. The variety of mini games and different tasks are both funny and unique. There is a bit of frustration with some of them, but your friends will have the same silly issues. Overall, a fun party game that you can come back to time and again for some good laughs.

For a game that’s meant to be played with others, what sense does it make that in order to unlock anything you have to play by yourself?

No crashing issues, but plenty of bad physics. Throwing is a pain. Finer movements like inserting a hook is leads to wonky collisions, etc.

Seems like they made the game, put out a few updates to address the major issues, and then just completely abandoned it.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for the feedback.  

In single-player mode, the minigames are sorted into 4 Tiers.  Earning a medal in each minigame in a tier will unlock the next tier.  The minigames get more difficult/complex as you go up the tiers, we felt this would help players get to grips with the mechanics as they play through.

We originally released Loco Dojo in 2017 on the Oculus Rift and since then have done a number of ports and updates.  Since launching on Quest, we added Pass n Play mode and a few minor updates/fixes.  Aside from bug fixes, we don't currently have any plans for further updates/additions.

If you encounter any specific problems that you need help with, please email us at info@locodojogame.com

reviews.review_description: This is a favourite of ours.good to play with kids but I wish they would get another board game to create more options and mini games to play. That would be theee beeeat!

developer_response.body: So glad to hear you're enjoying the game!  Unfortunately we don't have any current plans to add more minigames or features to Loco Dojo

reviews.review_description: No one is ever on to play with. Gonna get a refund :(

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback and for checking out the game.  We're sorry to hear you've struggled to connect with other players online.  Amount of players online does vary throughout the week and tends to be busiest at weekends.  But you can also set up private matches with your friends, or play Pass n Play at home with one headset (works great if you cast to a device so players can spectate when not in VR).  And of course single player is super fun too!  

We hope you'll consider adjusting your review score, happy gaming!

reviews.review_description:
The idea of having minigames are awesome,however the little details go down the drain and makes the game a little annoying.
I will point out the following that can be improven:

-There should be options to skip the introduction of the old man speaking.
-When you and your friends earn the next color belt, make it so we earn it at the same time, you make us wait 5 seconds for player and this is irritating when you could add all of them at once.
-The ninja biscuit mini game is broken; when the player who's defending he can barely see the biscuits; when the player who's throwing them, most of them get glued to your hand  and it makes the throw sloppy.
I also want to point out that the description of the begining of each game is confusing, it would be great adding a mini video example  or using proper/easy words  to understand better.
It sucks that there aren't many players online but the game is good, and I hope you keep improving it, cuz it can be a 5/5
I started playing & lost track of time it was so much fun

reviews.review_title: LIKE NINTENDO LAND BUT FOR VR
reviews.review_description:
🔥MULTIPLAYER GAMEPLAY ON OCULUS QUEST 2 CAN BE FOUND BY SEARCHING🔥
⭐️GAMERTAG VR LOCO DOJO⭐️

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review and video - sorry you had audio issues, these should be fixed now with the latest patch including private lobbies.

reviews.review_description: Awful controls and just made to annoy you.

The game is really fun, but with a newborn I need to take frequent short breaks. I play this in multiplayer with my wife only, and when one of us walks away for more than a minute the game stops saying one of us was inactive for too long. I wish there was a way to increase the inactivity timer, or remove it all together. A game save would also be helpful, so when the game times out we don't need to restart from the beginning. The inactivity timer kills this game for us.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for your review and congratulations on the newborn! The timeout is required by the system VRCs unfortunately but we recommend changing your headset timeout / auto-sleep settings in the main Quest settings so then you can leave the headset off longer. Hope that helps you continue playing more easily whilst juggling precious time

reviews.review_description: Loads of fun mini games to play and challenge yourself, love the effects and creative game ideas.👍

How do I get a refund? Game has game breaking bugs throughout. Could be super fun but not when it’s broken. The hog hook crashes the game every single time. First game on VR I’ve had game breaking issues with

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback.  Some players had been reporting a game crash when entering Hook a Hog in multiplayer with 3 or more players.  We've just updated the game with a fix.  Sorry it's taken so long - it took a while to locate the source of problem.  If this fixes the issue for you, we hope you'll consider updating your rating!

reviews.review_description: I was gonna get this game and peer pressure my friends into getting it. They did not buy the game and now I’m left with garbage and can’t refund it. F you

developer_response.body: Sorry your friends do not like fun. Unfortunately we are unable to issue refunds, it is not within our control. You can go through the Quest refund request as outlined here: https://store.facebook.com/gb/en/legal/quest/quest-rift-content-refund-policy/ - have a lovely day

reviews.review_description: I mean the game is good but the cloud is annoying and that’s why I don’t like I hope they can change this by the way the pigs game have a bug

developer_response.body: Sorry you have a bug with the pigs game, can you let us know which game in particular as many of our games involve pigs - Hook a Hog? Apple Dash? Pig Bridge? Milking a Pig via Piglets?

reviews.review_title: Great game please unlock its potential
reviews.review_description: Please make an optional for local multiplayer to be structured like the pass and play. It just makes sense that if I have a family member over who has an oculus, we can set up a game where we can choose the number of rounds with each of our favorite mini games. Give us more freedom to choose please and I think that little detail would take the game over the top!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the feedback!  Your best bet is to jump into Four Round Fury and invite your friend to join (or you can create a party using the Meta social features) - that way you get to choose the minigame each round.

reviews.review_description: Love playing this with the grandkids.   I can even win sometimes!!!!!

developer_response.body: You're supposed to let them win! No, wait... smash them into oblivion! It is the way of the dojo. Many thanks for your review, follow our socials for hints and tips to make sure you win more often

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and so engaging. Riding the pig is a tad scary but I love all the games even when the shark gets me!!!

developer_response.body: Glad you are loving it Michelle, even if scary! (Trick is not to get gotten by the shark - duck!)

reviews.review_description:
This game is so much fun. Me and my brother play the board game one and love it to pieces!!! Would love to see it have an option to be paired up with other people wanting to play because my brother is still in school and isnt always able to have a game. 
This game is definitely so much more fun with other people. But omg the gameplay so much fun!! If this game were a food itd be delicious

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you're enjoying the game!  And we agree that Loco Dojo multiplayer is super fun.  If you don't have any friends available to play, you can always jump into 'Four Round Fury' and the game will automatically match you up with any other players who are waiting to join a game!

reviews.review_description:

Great party game unfortunately it was manly purchase for a 2 player experience and it isn’t that fun with just 2 people.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback - you might be able to find players to join up with on our Discord.

reviews.review_description: I'd highly recommend this game to anyone who loves Mario party!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review - we're so glad that you're enjoying Loco Dojo!
